name: Nebula Pulse
description: Deep space nebula rhythms with cosmic resonance

prompts.SessionStart: warm pulsing pad synth ascending with rhythmic modulation, deep space pad, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: pulsing pad synth descending smoothly with warm modulated decay, deep space pad, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: single warm pad synth chime with satisfying pulsing ring, deep space tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct pad synth tick with brief pulsing click, space tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short pad synth chirp confirming with bright modulated ping, deep space tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two pulsing pad synth tones with questioning rising interval, space pad, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady pulsing pad synth with warm rhythmic modulation, deep space hum, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: pulsing pad synth splitting into two diverging modulated voices, space tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear pulsing pad synth ping returning with warm modulated ring, space tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright pulsing pad synth burst with energetic modulated attack, deep space tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
